title: Veiligheidsmonitor 2025 (CBS / Ministerie van JenV)
note: The long half of the pair with cbs-persbericht-criminaliteit. 127 pages: the long-context stress test.
licence: CBS content is reusable with source attribution ('Bron: CBS').
expectedCharacteristics: Converges on the same headline numbers the CBS press release chose, out of 127 pages of tables

Does not degenerate into a table of contents of the report's structure
